hero.subtitle: Every project is a transformation story. Here are ours.

gcp.title: Data Migration to GCP + Power BI Dashboards
gcp.shortDesc: Data centralization and connected dashboard creation
gcp.fullDesc: Company with data scattered across Excel files and legacy databases. We centralized all data on BigQuery, created automated ETL pipelines and developed real-time connected Power BI dashboards.
gcp.challenge: Data was scattered across multiple Excel files and legacy systems, making a unified view impossible for management.
gcp.solution: Complete migration to BigQuery, orchestration with Dataflow, interactive Power BI dashboard creation and team training.

airflow.title: Data pipeline automation with Airflow
airflow.fullDesc: Daily manual processing mobilizing an entire team. We automated and made recurring processes reliable with Airflow.
airflow.challenge: A team of 3 spent 20h per week on manual data processing, a source of errors and delays.
airflow.solution: Orchestration with Airflow, automated DAGs, real-time monitoring and alerting, complete documentation.
airflow.result: 20h of manual work eliminated per week, 0 processing errors

saas.title: SaaS platform development
saas.shortDesc: Complete web application with leasing model
saas.fullDesc: Client wanting to digitize their business with a leasing model. We designed a complete, scalable application with payment management.
saas.challenge: Create a platform from scratch with complex leasing contract management, recurring payments and client dashboard.
saas.solution: Full-stack web application with Laravel, complete REST API, Stripe integration for payments, scalable cloud architecture.
saas.result: Platform live with 500+ active users in 3 months

analytics_project.title: Analytics solution for digital marketing
analytics_project.fullDesc: Marketing team with no visibility on campaign ROI. We implemented a complete tracking and optimization system.
analytics_project.challenge: No visibility on campaign ROI, impossible to optimize marketing budgets effectively.
analytics_project.solution: Advanced Google Analytics 4 setup, custom tracking dashboards, conversion tracking, automated reporting.
analytics_project.result: +35% campaign ROI thanks to data insights

chatbot.title: AI Chatbot for customer support
chatbot.fullDesc: Customer support overwhelmed by recurring request volume. We developed an intelligent AI chatbot.
chatbot.challenge: The support team spent 70% of their time on recurring questions, delaying complex requests.
chatbot.solution: LLM-based chatbot, knowledge base integration, intelligent escalation to humans.
chatbot.result: 70% of level 1 support requests handled automatically

warehouse.title: Modern data warehouse
warehouse.fullDesc: Obsolete data infrastructure unable to support growth. Migration to a modern cloud-native architecture.
warehouse.challenge: Query times of several minutes, unreliable data, impossible to scale with growth.
warehouse.solution: Cloud-native architecture with BigQuery, dbt for transformation, complete monitoring, data governance.
